name: saas-standards
description: Enforce non-negotiable SaaS application standards — signup, mandatory onboarding, route guards, database schema, backend/ORM selection, and state-management architecture. Prevents the #1 failure mode: signup flows with only email/password and zero onboarding. Bundles 4 workflow playbooks (AuditSignupFlow, ScaffoldAuth, AuditStateManagement, SelectDataLayer) plus reference docs for signup/onboarding, route guards, healthcare SaaS, data layer, and state management.
